task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output to Profile and ResolvedConfig structs
steps.instruction:
Add field `pub cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` to struct Profile at src/config.rs:44 (after cost_per_mtok_input), and add the same field to struct ResolvedConfig at src/config.rs:175 (after cost_per_mtok_input)
